calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar May-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for default judgment against Defendant Global Air Land Sea and Space Logistics Corporation.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:27:49 a.m. and concluding at 9:32:45 a.m. (D505)

Jakob S. Weitz, Esq. representing Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Global Air Land Sea and Space Logistics Corporation not appearing.
Witness Benjamin Seeman, sworn to testify for the plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed September 15, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Global Air Land Sea and Space Logistics Corporation on November 9, 2023; service effectuated on November 20, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Global Air Land Sea and Space Logistics Corporation on December 26, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Does 1 through 10, inclusive February 27, 2024

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to discuss the amounts sought.
Counsel to offer proof as to witness testimony.
Witness is examined by the Court.
Witness confirms that statements made by counsel are true and correct.
Witness confirms that the declaration submitted to the best of his personal knowledge is true and correct.

Based on the testimony, statements made, and declarations submitted, the court finds that the plaintiff has met their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover the following from the Defendant:
Damages $26,880.48
Interest $4,149.17
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $570.09
Total Judgment $34,424.74

Proposed order as modified according to proof is signed and executed this day.

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-26-2024 Continued To May-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Jun-12-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
